title: Windsurf
summary: Windsurf hit #1 this week with Wave 13 dropping sick autonomous agent abilities. Write, test, debug, deploy—all without manually approving every diff. It's like having a dev partner instead of an autocomplete.
takeaway: AI-native IDE with Cascade agent for autonomous multi-file coding

title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
summary: Anthropic finally shipped 1M token context in GA. It's lowkey insane for handling huge codebases without paying Opus rates. Computer use improvements mean Claude can actually drive UI tasks better now.
takeaway: 1M context window, better computer use, power-user pricing at $3/$15

title: Perplexity Personal Computer
summary: Perplexity's new system lets your spare Mac run as a local AI agent handling research, automation, and tasks in the background. Basically turns any machine into your personal AI assistant without cloud dependency.
takeaway: Your Mac becomes an autonomous local AI agent (waitlist live)
